TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Quri Mgdurug ŚąÜŚ®© Kuyuh mshjil o mkuy gasil 1 idas, malu ka mtbiyax mseusa, babaw 6 idas musa mlatat ngangut siida o asi ka qmlahang qbhni sisil, naqih o asi brinah miyah sapah=,(nii o qmlahang khrahan ni mkray gdurug),ini tduwa embbgay qaya txaun=(khrahun), kmsiyuk hnaluy kuyuh hbaraw laqi o malu ini tduwa mkan qapal blbul. Pkrjingan hlitun empgdurug do ini pniqi seejiq kasapah, mtucing ngangut o psaniq, lbuan ni hnaluy kuyuh o rbngun truma srakaw,smqit puwa ga puwa laqi snaw o psaun towkan,puwa laqi kuyuh o psaun ska ubung)nii o aji ttakur sapah.1 idas gdrgun sapah ka kuyuh, mnegdurug musa smapuh karat aji seeliq karat. Mturul ka laqi o nasi snaw ni kuyuh o aji malu,phqilun ka tgkuyuh. Mtucung ka laqi tgplealay wana siida ka biqan qnaras ka quri anay nanak=(rudux, pala, putung saw nii), ini biqi ka hrmadan na kuyuh. Pthangan mntucing babaw mk10 jiyax ka laqi, Pthangan o mangal hari hangan rudan snaw o hangan laqi snaw, kuyuh o hangan kuyuh. ita o ungat ka pnsgeegul 1 hangan paah rudan bukuy hangan laqi o psnowlun hangan tama(bubu), mkdka hangan siida do malan hangan baki aji uri o payi da, mniq bukuy ka hangan tama(bubu)o kmpriyux duma. Nasi Awi o kmriyux Nawi Gaya tmngahan ŚĎĹŚźćÁöĄŤ¶ŹŚČá A===Na I====Ney U====Now Awi=Nawi Iban=Neyban Udaw=Nowdaw Abis=Nabis Ibuh=Neybuh Ukan=Nowkan Apay=Napay Iyung=Nryyung Umaw=Nowmaw
S.PHON: qu…ĺi mgdu…ĺug ** kujuńß msńß…üil o mkuj gasil * idas, malu ka mtbijax ms…ôusa, babaw * idas musa mlatat ŇčaŇčut siida o asi ka qmlańßaŇč qbńßni sisil, naqińß o asi b…ĺinańß mijańß sapańß=,(nii o qmlańßaŇč kńß…ĺańßan ni mk…ĺaj gdu…ĺug),ini tduwa …ômbbgaj qaja txaun=(kńß…ĺańßun), kmsijuk ńßnaluj kujuńß ńßba…ĺaw laqi o malu ini tduwa mkan qapal blbul. pk…ĺ…üiŇčan ńßlitun …ômpgdu…ĺug do ini pniqi s…ô…ô…üiq kasapańß, mtu ¶iŇč ŇčaŇčut o psaniq, lbuan ni ńßnaluj kujuńß o …ĺbŇčun t…ĺuma s…ĺakaw,smqit puwa ga puwa laqi snaw o psaun towkan,puwa laqi kujuńß o psaun ska ubuŇč)nii o a…üi ttaku…ĺ sapańß.* idas gd…ĺgun sapańß ka kujuńß, mn…ôgdu…ĺug musa smapuńß ka…ĺat a…üi s…ô…ôliq ka…ĺat. mtu…ĺul ka laqi o nasi snaw ni kujuńß o a…üi malu,pńßqilun ka tgkujuńß. mtu ¶uŇč ka laqi tgpl…ôalaj wana siida ka biqan qna…ĺas ka qu…ĺi anaj nanak=(…ĺudux, pala, putuŇč saw nii), ini biqi ka ńß…ĺmadan na kujuńß. ptńßaŇčan mntu ¶iŇč babaw mk** …üijax ka laqi, ptńßaŇčan o maŇčal ńßa…ĺi ńßaŇčan …ĺudan snaw o ńßaŇčan laqi snaw, kujuńß o ńßaŇčan kujuńß. ita o uŇčat ka pnsg…ô…ôgul * ńßaŇčan paańß …ĺudan bukuj ńßaŇčan laqi o psnowlun ńßaŇčan tama(bubu), mkdka ńßaŇčan siida do malan ńßaŇčan baki a…üi u…ĺi o paji da, mniq bukuj ka ńßaŇčan tama(bubu)o kmp…ĺijux duma. nasi awi o km…ĺijux nawi gaja tmŇčańßan ***** a===na i====n…ô u====now awi=nawi iban=n…ôban udaw=nowdaw abis=nabis ibuńß=n…ôbuńß ukan=nowkan apaj=napaj ijuŇč=n…ĺjjuŇč umaw=nowmaw
S.FORM: Quri Mgdurug ŚąÜŚ®© Kuyuh mshjil o mkuy gasil 1 idas, malu ka mtbiyax mseusa, babaw 6 idas musa mlatat ngangut siida o asi ka qmlahang qbhni sisil, naqih o asi brinah miyah sapah=,(nii o qmlahang khrahan ni mkray gdurug),ini tduwa embbgay qaya txaun=(khrahun), kmsiyuk hnaluy kuyuh hbaraw laqi o malu ini tduwa mkan qapal blbul. Pkrjingan hlitun empgdurug do ini pniqi seejiq kasapah, mtucing ngangut o psaniq, lbuan ni hnaluy kuyuh o rbngun truma srakaw,smqit puwa ga puwa laqi snaw o psaun towkan,puwa laqi kuyuh o psaun ska ubung)nii o aji ttakur sapah.1 idas gdrgun sapah ka kuyuh, mnegdurug musa smapuh karat aji seeliq karat. Mturul ka laqi o nasi snaw ni kuyuh o aji malu,phqilun ka tgkuyuh. Mtucung ka laqi tgplealay wana siida ka biqan qnaras ka quri anay nanak=(rudux, pala, putung saw nii), ini biqi ka hrmadan na kuyuh. Pthangan mntucing babaw mk10 jiyax ka laqi, Pthangan o mangal hari hangan rudan snaw o hangan laqi snaw, kuyuh o hangan kuyuh. ita o ungat ka pnsgeegul 1 hangan paah rudan bukuy hangan laqi o psnowlun hangan tama(bubu), mkdka hangan siida do malan hangan baki aji uri o payi da, mniq bukuy ka hangan tama(bubu)o kmpriyux duma. Nasi Awi o kmriyux Nawi Gaya tmngahan ŚĎĹŚźćÁöĄŤ¶ŹŚČá A===Na I====Ney U====Now Awi=Nawi Iban=Neyban Udaw=Nowdaw Abis=Nabis Ibuh=Neybuh Ukan=Nowkan Apay=Napay Iyung=Nryyung Umaw=Nowmaw
S.PHON: qu…ĺi mgdu…ĺug ** kujuńß msńß…üil o mkuj gasil * idas, malu ka mtbijax ms…ôusa, babaw * idas musa mlatat ŇčaŇčut siida o asi ka qmlańßaŇč qbńßni sisil, naqińß o asi b…ĺinańß mijańß sapańß=,(nii o qmlańßaŇč kńß…ĺańßan ni mk…ĺaj gdu…ĺug),ini tduwa …ômbbgaj qaja txaun=(kńß…ĺańßun), kmsijuk ńßnaluj kujuńß ńßba…ĺaw laqi o malu ini tduwa mkan qapal blbul. pk…ĺ…üiŇčan ńßlitun …ômpgdu…ĺug do ini pniqi s…ô…ô…üiq kasapańß, mtu ¶iŇč ŇčaŇčut o psaniq, lbuan ni ńßnaluj kujuńß o …ĺbŇčun t…ĺuma s…ĺakaw,smqit puwa ga puwa laqi snaw o psaun towkan,puwa laqi kujuńß o psaun ska ubuŇč)nii o a…üi ttaku…ĺ sapańß.* idas gd…ĺgun sapańß ka kujuńß, mn…ôgdu…ĺug musa smapuńß ka…ĺat a…üi s…ô…ôliq ka…ĺat. mtu…ĺul ka laqi o nasi snaw ni kujuńß o a…üi malu,pńßqilun ka tgkujuńß. mtu ¶uŇč ka laqi tgpl…ôalaj wana siida ka biqan qna…ĺas ka qu…ĺi anaj nanak=(…ĺudux, pala, putuŇč saw nii), ini biqi ka ńß…ĺmadan na kujuńß. ptńßaŇčan mntu ¶iŇč babaw mk** …üijax ka laqi, ptńßaŇčan o maŇčal ńßa…ĺi ńßaŇčan …ĺudan snaw o ńßaŇčan laqi snaw, kujuńß o ńßaŇčan kujuńß. ita o uŇčat ka pnsg…ô…ôgul * ńßaŇčan paańß …ĺudan bukuj ńßaŇčan laqi o psnowlun ńßaŇčan tama(bubu), mkdka ńßaŇčan siida do malan ńßaŇčan baki a…üi u…ĺi o paji da, mniq bukuj ka ńßaŇčan tama(bubu)o kmp…ĺijux duma. nasi awi o km…ĺijux nawi gaja tmŇčańßan ***** a===na i====n…ô u====now awi=nawi iban=n…ôban udaw=nowdaw abis=nabis ibuńß=n…ôbuńß ukan=nowkan apaj=napaj ijuŇč=n…ĺjjuŇč umaw=nowmaw
